items.previewDescription: Can I make it as an actor at 16? MY JOURNEY STARTS NOW!!
items.title: Magnus Ispas

topComments.text:
Unless you’re rich, I’d avoid moving to Los Angeles.  You can get so much further by staying in Europe and sending audition tapes from here.

If you get an in person audition, I’d advise renting a room for a month or so in LA and book as many in person auditions while you’re in town.

Rent, even for a room in a less desirable area, is outrageous!  After moving to Germany from Seattle, I now pay more than $800 LESS per month in rent and I live in a furnished apartment that is ~ 1.5 to 2 times the rate than would be charged on the unfurnished market.

My utilities, groceries, healthcare, etc. are ALL cheaper in Germany.

Get experience here and in the UK before heading to the USA.

items.text:
CASTING CALL / PAID / Non-Union

We’re looking for six people aged 18-35 with relevant and authentic interests in one or all of the following: photography, hiking, camping, cycling.  Lovers of the outdoors.  Fans of Gorpcore and Outdoorwear Style.

Photography and Video.  Non-speaking roles.

We’re specifically looking for:

1 x Non-White North American Male
1 x White North American Female
1 x Korean Male  

1 x Korean Female  

1 x Japanese Male  

1 x Japanese Female 

Dates: 1 or 2 days over the window 19 20 21 22 May 2026

Budget: $600 per day plus $1250 buyout.

Usage: 5 years in all media except OOH and DOOH, but including retail and CTV.  

Please share details of your relevant interests and submit a selection of recent pictures to jack@tcolondon.com

sharedPost.text:
📍WARSZAWA/MARKI
📅01.05. Piątek
🎬 STATYSTA Z AUTEM (do TŁA)
💰Wynagrodzenie za dzień zdjęciowy płatne na planie: 180 zł

📅02.05. Sobota
🎬PRACOWNICY W FABRYCE
💰Wynagrodzenie za dzień zdjęciowy płatne na planie: 110 zł

Do nowego projektu filmowego pod roboczym tytułem SANATORIUM poszukujemy osoby statystujące z Marek i okolic lub z Warszawy wg poniższego opisu:

📅01.05. Piątek MARKI
Osoby w wieku 25-60 lat które w scenie przyjeżdżają do pracy w fabryce cukierniczej WŁASNYMI samochodami i zostawiają je na parkingu przed zakładem. 
Każda marka, każdy model ale nie każdy kolor. UNIKAMY samochodów koloru BIAŁEGO.

📅02.05. Sobota MARKI
Osoby w wieku 25-60 lat przy maszynach w FABRYCE CUKIERNICZEJ, na stanowisku pracy.

Można się zgłosic na jeden lub dwa dni.

UWAGA! Na oba dni będą przygotowane specjalne kostiumy robocze, dlatego w zgłoszeniu proszę podać wzrost i rozmiar ubrania, żeby można było dobrać odpowiednie osoby do posiadanych przez garderobę ubrań .

Zgłoszenia: imię, nazwisko, wiek, nr tel., miasto zamieszkania, wzrost, rozmiar ubrania, 2 AKTUALNE ZDJĘCIA: portret i sylwetka, oraz w przypadku właścicieli aut dodatkowo zdjęcie samochodu

proszę przesłać na adres:

fabula@sceneria.com.pl

TEMAT: 01.05 i/lub 02.05_FABRYKA

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy matki francuskiej dziewczynki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje kobiety **w wieku 30 – 35 lat** do roli matki francuskiej dziewczynki. Kobieta wystąpi w 2 scenach ataku Niemców na budynek cywilny. W jednej scenie postać matki dziewczynki ma dialog po francusku ze swoją córką. Mile widziana osoba **z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrze czy Katowice.** Szukamy kogoś bez farbowanych włosów, bez malowanych paznokci czy braku tatuaży na twarzy. Zdjęcia próbne planujemy **17.05.26 między 10:30 a 15:00 ( Niedziela )**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

[https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g)

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

attachments.ocrText: Może być zdjęciem przedstawiającym tekst „a ePn 62131 15 Galaxy S25Ultra 15marea202611: Mane rea ทา 1:31 Galaxy 525 itra 15marca202614:59”

items.text:
🌟 **CASTING CALL: Male-Identifying Performer for Danny Go! Tribute Show** 🌟
Are you ready to bring the energy and get everyone moving? We are casting a vibrant, male-identifying performer to step into the shoes of Danny Go! for an exciting live tribute show at Otterspool Adventure in Liverpool.

**📍 Location:** Otterspool Adventure, Liverpool
**📅 Initial Dates:** 16th & 17th May
*(Note: There will be further work available throughout the year in this role and within our numerous other productions!)*

**The Role:**
 * You will host and perform a fast-paced, 30-minute scripted one-man show.
 * You must be highly confident, able to command the stage, and bring massive amounts of energy.
 * Crucially, you must have the skills to keep an audience of toddlers fully engaged and entertained from start to finish!
* Visually, you'll be able to accurately portray the role of Danny Go!

**Remuneration:**
 * **Rehearsals:** Paid hourly at the National Minimum Wage (NMW) for your age group.
 * **Performance Days:** £100 per day.

**How to Apply:**
Please send your CV and a headshot or recent photograph to **adam@ajdance.co.uk**.

*Important: Please ensure you use the subject line "Danny Go" so your application is not missed.
*
Tag any fantastic performers below who would be perfect for this! 👇🎭

sharedPost.text:
Acting is Not the Jobs

I wrote this monologue for the actors in my weekly workshop in Ryde. 

But really, it’s for every actor who’s ever sat in their car after class thinking, “Why do I do this?”

It’s for the ones juggling shifts and self-tapes.  
For the ones who haven’t booked in a year but still turn up on Tuesday nights.  
For the drama students wondering if the industry even wants them.

Acting isn’t just the jobs. The jobs are rare.  
Acting is finding yourself in yourself.  
It’s finding yourself in others.  
It’s the reminder that you’re not mad — there are other humans on this earth just as obsessed with telling stories as you are.

If you need that reminder today, this one’s for you.

•  #ukactor
•  #britishactor
•  #northernactor
•  #manchesteractor
•  #leedsactor
•  #tvactor

🎬 **CASTING CALL – North West UK**
Looking for actors for an upcoming  film shot in South Manchester. 

Casting call .  Fake News series. Comedy/ Drama 

3 supporting roles 

Follow the project on Instagram:  @fakenewsmovie

✨ Mum / Auntie 

Aged 35-52

Brown eyes , naturally Brunette hair ( could be dyed)

4'10-5'3.

Storyline  , your betrayal your daughter Trust.

✨ Jessica 18/20

Storyline : you accidentally break your cousins trust 

✨ Maria 

18-24

Able to do a French  European accent or naturally European.

Storyline : you fall in love in a meet cute and exchange messages  with a boy.

Drama / action  comedy , satire .

A young man will take massive risks to his freedom to try and win back his girlfriend.

📍 Manchester) Stockport 

📅 Dates TBC - May /June 

⚠️ Unpaid (travel + catering provided)

📩 Send headshot, availability & showreel to:

richardmichaelmartinhowe1@outlook.com

Email for more information and send either video link , or a show reel link , your c.v. or spotlight.

All applications are fully considered. So don't hesitate to send some information and something for us to watch about yourself and highlights your acting and performing talents.

Please share with actors in the **North West

#CastingCallUK #NorthWestActors #ActorsWanted #IndieFilm #ShortFilmCasting

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – PSYCHOLOGICAL HORROR FILM “PUPPET”

Hi everyone,

I’m a London-based filmmaker currently directing a psychological horror film titled “Puppet”, alongside my co-producer and writer.

We’ve recently launched our crowdfunding campaign and have already raised £231, and we’re now moving into casting and pre-production.

ABOUT THE FILM:

“Puppet” is a psychological horror that explores perception, hallucinations, and the breakdown of reality. The story follows a young woman whose mental state begins to deteriorate as she experiences disturbing visions and a growing loss of control over her mind and surroundings and soul.

The film focuses on atmosphere, realism, and emotional intensity rather than relying solely on jump scares.

ROLES AVAILABLE:

• Lead (Female, 16-25)
A psychologically intense role requiring strong emotional range : fear, confusion, vulnerability, and distress. Needs to have a good scream, and a good blank stare

• Second Lead (Female, 16-25)
A character that involves duality, at first free spirited and kind, a cool mature, aesthetic teen vibe, and later in the film, a creepy and intense presence, this role requires emotional range : anger, sadistic and manic nature, and just overall intensity 

• Supporting - Girlfriend (Female, 16-25)
A grounded and caring presence, emotionally connected to the lead.

• Supporting - Father / Authority Figure (Male, 25+)
Calm, observant, detached and distant. Adds realism and tension.
   
• Supporting - The boss
(Female 20+)
Has a few lines, talkative yet authoritative. 

(Open to all ethnicities)

ADDITIONAL / SUPPORTING ROLES:

We are also looking for people to take part in smaller or background roles, including:

• Friends / party guests
• Dead mother 
• Background characters
• Office workers
• Doctors/ nurses 
• Passersby (street scenes)

These roles are less demanding but still important in building a realistic world for the film.

DETAILS:

• Location: London
• Filming: Outside school/work hours
• Duration: Approx. 1–2 weeks
• Project type: Independent / student-led
• Unpaid (food + travel covered where possible)
• Great opportunity for experience, showreel material, and credits

The filming time will be split to specific days that are spread out throughout the month of filming to give enough time for editing and assessment as well as enough breathing room to fit everyone’s schedule. 

AUDITIONS:

Auditions will be held via self-tape or in person.

If interested, please message with:

• Name
• Age
• Location
• Any acting experience (not required)
• A recent photo/headshot
You can DM or email me here; 
Ifeafammbonu@gmail.com

We’re really excited to start bringing this project to life and to collaborate with passionate and creative people 🤍

Liebe Filmemacher & Schauspieler, 

wieso ist Networking wichtiger, als dein Talent als Filmemacher?

Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget Fantasy Horror Spielfilm Projekt, suchen wir noch Darsteller für die Endschlacht, Rollen: Ritter und Räuber. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald, Zeitraum ab April 2026
Bewerbungen mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, (gerne könnt ihr und auch ein kleines Vorstellungsvideo senden) an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

RUSZAMY Z NOWYM FILMEM FABULARNYM. Poszukujemy statystów! 

DATA: 10/05/2026
MIEJSCE: Warszawa
STAWKA za statystę dorosłego: 110 zł 
dziecko: 130 zł 

ROLE:
- pracownik kolei - mężczyzna, około 40 lat, zmęczony pracą, może mieć brzuszek 
- mężczyzna około 60 lat na rowerze
- biegacz - wysportowany mężczyzna około 30 lat 
- dziewczyny z walizkami około 25 lat
- kobieta na spacerze 55-60 lat
- mężczyźni w garniturach - eleganccy, zadbani, 40-50 lat
- starszy pan - około 75 lat 
- mężczyzna około 45 lat z psem typu kundel (za pieska +60 zł) 
- rodzina - mama, tata + dziecko w wózku 
- nastolatkowie - chłopcy w wieku 15-17 lat
- zakochana para - prawdziwa para, wiek około 35 lat 
- 10 osób z autami - auta nie nowsze niż 2018 rok (za auto +60 zł)

ZGŁOSZENIA:
sceneriaagencja@gmail.com
W tytule maila: FH 10/05 + wybrana rola

W treści: imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu, miejsce zamieszkania, wzrost, wymiary: klatka/wzrost/biodra, rozmiar buta, zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki

Do serialu GLINIARZE realizowanego w Warszawie (oraz bliskich okolicach) szukam:

- Pitbul (26) – drobny diler, sportowe ubranie. Pracuje na bramce. Łysy, napakowany. 2 sceny 
DATA: 6.05
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Czarek Kartucki (35)  – wspólnik i chłopak Justyny. Drobny oszust, który zawsze chodzi na skróty. 3 sceny 
DATA: 5.05
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

- Kamil Zawora (35) – typ amanta, fajtłapowaty. Cwaniak, ale przygłupi. Chinosy, koszula, kurtka lub sweter.  3 sceny
DATA 7.05
STAWKA 500 zł netto

- Agnieszka Nowińska (31) – zimna i wyrachowana. Wie jak się ustawić. Dla zysku zrobi wszystko. Ubiera się jaskrawo, tandetnie. Uwaga: Blondynka. 3 sceny  –  KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
DATA 7.05
STAWKA 500 zł netto

- Mechanik (27) – Tomasz Labuz, przyzwoicie zbudowany, pyszałkowaty, ubrany w strój roboczy – ogrodniczki. 2 sceny 
DATA 8.05
STAWKA 400 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl
W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
Die mobile „Ferrari Club Deutschland e.V. Hausband“ stellt sich vor ☝️
🟪 Kabellos Mobil Band 🟪

sharedPost.text:
Der Ferrari Club Deutschland

Im Juni 2010 lernten wir uns auf Sylt kennen!
Seit dem verbindet uns eine vertrauensvolle Beziehung und Zusammenarbeit. 
Ich bin stolz und glücklich so einen Kunden über so eine lange Zeit zu bedienen und denke es ist eine Art „Ritterschlag“,  der uns in unserer Szene auszeichnet. 

Da ist einfach dieses spezielle Vertrauen, dass man immer wieder in uns setzt. 

Nun waren wir wieder einmal mit den Ferraristi unterwegs. 

Um 16 Uhr starteten wir am Bootsanleger an Kameha Grand Hotel in Bonn auf einem Rheinschiff in Richtung Kölner Altstadt. 

Nach einem Fußweg von 1,4 km kamen wir im „Sünner im Walfisch“ an, wo wir den FERRARI CLUB bis um 23:00 Uhr bespielten. 

🟪 Kabellos 2.0 🟪 hat gestern mit der neuen Besetzung, der überarbeiteten Song Auswahl und neuer energetischer Präsenz einen weiteren Meilenstein in Reihen des Ferrari Clubs Deutschland e.V. gesetzt. 

Solche Kunden fühlen, sehen und verstehen, dass man im Einsatz vor Ort MEHR als Musik bietet ☝️ 

Die Kritik und Empathie, die man 
🟪 Kabellos 2.0 🟪 entgegen brachte, suchte seinesgleichen!

Solche Feedbacks sorgen bestimmt mit dafür, dass man nach 40 Jahren professionellem, musikalischen Status und fast 5000 gespielten Auftritten immer noch für seine Sache brennt, wie am ersten Tag 😍👍

#kabellosmobilband
#ferrariclubdeutschland
#galaband
#mobilemusik
#professionalmusicians

items.text:
CASTING CALL - LONDON 🎬

Looking for talent for an upcoming video project shooting in London (week commencing 26th May):

- 1 x Female model (late 20s-early 30s)
- 1 x Family of 3-4 Turkish family (or families with Middle Eastern/Mediterranean heritage) - Children aged 5-10

Shoot duration: 2 days

This is a paid opportunity.

If interested, send your rate and portfolio via message.

topComments.text: Hi there, ….,We have Flexible work opportunity available nationwide and In London and surrounding areas - Email cashinhandlondoncash@gmail.com  for details- some travel costs covered depending on your location

sharedPost.text:
लोगों को लगा वो burger बेच रहा है…
लेकिन असल में वो पूरी दुनिया का system design कर रहा था…

हम में से ज़्यादातर लोग वही करते हैं जो दिखता है…
job, business, product…

लेकिन असली खिलाड़ी वो होता है जो ये समझ ले —
👉 game कहाँ बन रहा है
👉 control किसके पास है

याद रखो…
game खेलने वाले कभी जीतते हैं… कभी हारते हैं…
लेकिन…
game बनाने वाले हमेशा जीतते हैं। 🔥

⸻

#limitlesslove #successmindset #businesstruth #motivation #entrepreneurlife

Always something FRESH going on in my class! Whether it’s street, a musical theatre partner number, something lyrical or a festive Christmas group dance, we like to change it up every few weeks. I do this whilst also keeping things at a steady and manageable pace. (It is a class for beginners after all!) 

#beginnersdance #Liverpool #somethingtodo #tryitchallenge #liverpoolfitness

sharedPost.text:
The cards have spoken - Nocturne is expanding…🌙✨

We are Nocturne, a theatrical progressive metal band conjured in Liverpool, UK, drawing from Tool, Ghost, Dream Theater, Genesis and Rush.

We are seeking a drummer and guitarist to help expand our sound.

You should be:
• Experienced in live performance
• Able to commit to weekly rehearsals in Liverpool and/or Salford
• Comfortable in theatrical performance, costume, character, stage presence
• Creatively engaged and ready to add to a growing and established sound
• Professional, reliable and committed ✨

If this feels like you, send us a DM or email with a video of you playing (10 extra points if it’s dance of eternity) 

#liverpoolmusicians #metalbanduk #progmetal #joinaband #drummerwanted

items.text:
CASTING CALL — LOS ANGELES — HOSPITALITY INDUSTRIAL — NON-UNION

Location: Inglewood

Date: Monday, May 11

Time: 1 PM – 4 PM

Rate: $75

Casting for (7) speaking actor roles for a growing hospitality venture. 

ISO: 
1. **The Veteran Captain (M)**
Late 50s, calm to the point of mystery. He’s flown through everything; storms, system failures, even a rumored hijacking decades ago; but never talks about it. Younger pilots see him as a legend, though his reluctance to embrace new technology sometimes causes friction. Off-duty, he quietly builds model planes with obsessive precision.

1. **The Rule-Breaking First Officer (F)**
Early 30s, sharp, ambitious, and just a little too confident. She’s a brilliant pilot who cuts corners on protocol when she thinks she knows better; sometimes she does. Constantly butting heads with authority, she’s trying to prove she belongs in a space that hasn’t always welcomed her.

1. **The Charismatic Flight Attendant (F)**
Mid-20s, effortlessly charming and always one step ahead of passengers’ needs. They can defuse tense situations with humor and read people instantly; but hide a surprisingly complicated personal life. Dreams of becoming an actor, and treats every flight like a stage.

1. **The Overworked Aircraft Mechanic (M)**
40s, grease-stained and perpetually tired, but a genius with engines. Works night shifts and knows every plane in the fleet like an old friend. Cynical on the surface, but deeply protective of “their” aircraft and the people who fly in them. Keeps a secret notebook of recurring mechanical quirks no one else seems to notice.

1. **The Rookie Flight Attendant (M)**
Early 20s, wide-eyed and eager, fresh out of training. They memorized every safety procedure but struggle with real-world unpredictability—difficult passengers, delays, and crew politics. Over time, their idealism starts to clash with reality, forcing them to grow up fast.

1. **The Veteran Flight Attendant (F)**
Early 50s, impeccably composed, with decades of experience etched into every perfectly timed smile. She’s seen the golden age of air travel fade into budget cuts and packed cabins, and she carries a quiet nostalgia for how things used to be. To new crew members, she’s equal parts mentor and enforcer; she’ll teach you everything, but won’t tolerate shortcuts. Passengers trust her instantly, especially when things go wrong. 

1. **The Young Pilot (M)**
Mid-20s, recently promoted from first officer after an unusually fast rise. Technically gifted and deeply passionate about flying, but still learning how to command authority in high-pressure situations. He idolizes the veteran captain and tries to emulate his calm demeanor, sometimes overcorrecting into silence when he should speak up. Off the flight deck, he’s more relaxed; awkward, even; and still adjusting to the responsibility of having hundreds of lives in his hands.

If interested, please submit the following to [alex@layoverclub.app](mailto:alex@layoverclub.app): 

- Contact information

- Headshot, full body shot, reel

- Resume 

Please follow the subject line format of: First Name,Last Name - Role(s) - TLC Shoot

Please submit your profile & related materials by 5/1 .

items.text:
****CASTING CALL FOR INDEPENDENT SHORT FILM*****

**TITLE: **Vinyl Nights

**DIRECTOR: **Brandon Maxwell

**CONTACT: **gyrescapefilm@gmail.com

**SHOOT DATE: **June 2026 (date dependent on availability) in LA

**GENRE: **LGBTQ+ period rom-com

**LOGLINE: **Billy and Tommy, two seemingly polar-opposite waiters at a small-town diner, form an unexpected connection in their late-night shifts. As their relationship deepens, they’re forced to confront the limitations of their small town and decide whether love is something they can afford to risk in pursuit of their big dreams.

-------- 

**ROLES:**

**All roles are paid and must be comfortable with same-sex kissing. Dance experience preferred as well.**

**Billy **(Lead, male-presenting, 18-27)
* Artsy, expressive, and a little guarded
* Dreams of leaving town to pursue Broadway
* Uses humor and attitude to mask his true emotions

**Tommy **(Lead, male-presenting, 18-27)
* High school jock type
* Confident, grounded, sincere
* Dreams of being a writer but grapples with his family values

If interested, please comment your email and role(s) of interest below and I’ll reach out with more info! Please do not DM as those will not be read. Self tapes and headshots will be requested for each part. :)

**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – kobieta o blond włosach -  główny archeolog Ahnenerbe**

 

**Szukamy skarnu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940 **poszukuje kobiety do roli niemieckiej pani archeolog  w szukaniu historycznych artefaktów. Najlepiej jakby kandydatka miała **od 35 – 40 lat o blond włosach o szczupłej budowie ciała. Brak malowanych paznokci czy tatuaży będzie atutem. **Wszystkie kwestie postaci będą mówione po niemiecku dla lepszego efektu filmu oraz kilka po francusku gdyż będzie scena kiedy archeolog tłumaczy stare dokumenty średniowieczne. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic.

 

**Od czerwca 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

** **

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

sharedPost.text:
We are now casting  for our touring  Summer  show Bring Me Sunshine.
The show is a musical  show featuring songs from around the world La Bamba, Viva Espana, Come Fly With Me,. Summer Holiday ,  Sway , and many more.
We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .
The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.
Rehearsals- 25th  -29th May
Playing Dates- 1st June -31st July
We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day) 
Casting Breakdown 
We are looking for drivers with cars only .
We are looking for performers on all area of the UK -please include bases when sending details.
We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road 

 Also

Adult Panto  Jack Off The Beanstalk is back in the West End for 2026 thew show will   open at Scala London in the heart of London’s West End!

We are now casting for the following roles for our pantomime 

Jack Trott
We are looking for an actor who can play our hero  funny humble  a strong singer musical theatre/pop sound as well as a good mover with dashing looks and a great physique.
Must be comfortable  gong off script at  and working an  audience

Dame Trott - Male 
We are looking for experienced Dames/character actors who are larger than life with bags of personality as well as versatility and natural comedy must be great at working an audience and have the gift of the gab 
Must be comfortable  going off script  and working an  audience

Billy Trott  
We are   looking for a  very   strong  comic to play Jacks  idle Brother 
Must be comfortable  going off script and  and working an  audience .

Princess Jill 
We are looking  for  a  strong  actress  to play Jill must have all the attributes  to play traditional  principal  girl 
 Misat be a great  singer/mover and must be comfortable  going  off script  and working  an audience.

We are looking for strong   Male and Female Dancers that sing well  and  play cameo roles .

The Dates 
Auditions in May in central London 
Rehearsals-Monday 30th November -11th December 
Playing dates 14th December -3rd  January 2027
We are offering an attractive buy-out fee to include rehearsals and shows .

Please email details/reels  to info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

🎬 **CASTING CALL – PAID SOCIAL VIDEO PROJECT** (Nottingham)

Hey everyone! Sharing a great opportunity for local actors/content creators in collaboration with Nottingham City Council 👇

A **“Be Condom Confident” social video series** is currently casting – looking for people comfortable on camera to create natural, conversational content for social media.

💬 Ideal for:
• Actors
• Content creators / TikTokers
• Anyone confident speaking to camera

🎥 These types of projects usually involve short, authentic talking-style videos (often filmed on phones) for social media campaigns

💰 Paid opportunity (£200 for 5 hours work)
📍 Nottingham based (up to £50 travel allowance)

👉 Full details & apply here:

[https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3126220/be-condom-confident-social-video-series/?utm_source=social_share&utm_medium=copy_link&utm_campaign=casting_call](https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3126220/be-condom-confident-social-video-series/?utm_source=social_share&utm_medium=copy_link&utm_campaign=casting_call)

Feel free to tag anyone in Nottingham who might be a good fit 🙌

Join the Creative Circle — Future Opportunities
Hee creatives!

I’m developing an immersive art & theatre project in London, and we’re wrapping up our crew. If you’re an actor, writer, director, or any form of artist, we’d love to stay connected—we’re always looking for creatives for future opportunities!

Follow for updates:
Personal Instagram: @sunnyleevandijk
Production Company: @piratequeen_productions

Or drop your email in this form [https://forms.gle/v6Y4TJ2a2AU2KSRq5](https://forms.gle/v6Y4TJ2a2AU2KSRq5) to be first to hear about new calls, early invites, and behind-the-scenes updates. Let’s build something awesome together!

items.text:
**Szukam modelki na zasadzie TFP Gliwice/Katowice ( Śląsk ) ‘’Sensualny gotyk’’**

 

Szukam pań które nie krępują się własnego ciała i chciałaby mieć ciekawą pamiątkę w postaci klimatycznych zdjęć. Wiem jak bardzo jest ważna akceptacja własnego ciała bo przez to też możemy inaczej funkcjonować. Przez takie zdjęcia można również tego dokonać. Sesja w głównej mierze jest jako taki motywator. Tematem sesji będzie sensualny gotyk.

 

Poszukuje kobiety w **wieku od 20 - 50 **lat nie koniecznie z doświadczeniem pozowania, na zasadach Tfp mieszkającej w Gliwicach lub okolicach Zabrze czy Katowice najdalej. Posiadam na wyposażeniu mini studio z kilkoma tłami oraz lampami. Mam również duży wybór kostiumów i gadżetów do wykorzystywania. Główny motyw to kobieta w selsualnym gotyku. Mile widziane panie, które posiadają jakieś ciekawe stroję gotyckie. ** Ja natomiast mam różne gadżety pod otoczenie typu: świeczniki, skrzynki czy nawet kałamarz a nawet nóż do listów w stylu średniowiecznym.**

** **

**Facebook Łukasz Magiera – Fotografia**

www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

items.text:
Do serialu GLINIARZE realizowanego w Warszawie (oraz bliskich okolicach) szukam:

- Pitbul (26) – drobny diler, sportowe ubranie. Pracuje na bramce. Łysy, napakowany. 2 sceny 
DATA: 6.05
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Czarek Kartucki (35)  – wspólnik i chłopak Justyny. Drobny oszust, który zawsze chodzi na skróty. 3 sceny 
DATA: 5.05
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

- Kamil Zawora (35) – typ amanta, fajtłapowaty. Cwaniak, ale przygłupi. Chinosy, koszula, kurtka lub sweter.  3 sceny
DATA 7.05
STAWKA 500 zł netto

- Agnieszka Nowińska (31) – zimna i wyrachowana. Wie jak się ustawić. Dla zysku zrobi wszystko. Ubiera się jaskrawo, tandetnie. Uwaga: Blondynka. 3 sceny  –  KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
DATA 7.05
STAWKA 500 zł netto

- Mechanik (27) – Tomasz Labuz, przyzwoicie zbudowany, pyszałkowaty, ubrany w strój roboczy – ogrodniczki. 2 sceny 
DATA 8.05
STAWKA 400 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl
W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

DATA 8.05
STAWKA 400 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl
W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
**🎬 [CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM | LONDON]**

Hi everyone!

I’m currently casting for a **5 - 7 minute psychological drama short film**.

This project is a **director’s showcase piece** for film school application (NFTS), focused on atmosphere, emotion, and visual storytelling with minimal dialogue.

**SAYSORRY.ME**

The story follows a man trying to reconnect with someone he loves - but something feels wrong. The film explores **loss, regret, and the illusion of communication** in a quiet, intimate, and unsettling way.

The tone is grounded and realistic, with subtle psychological tension.

## **🎬 PROJECT PURPOSE **
* Director portfolio / film school submission
* Strong focus on performance, sound design, and visual storytelling
* Intended as a high-quality cinematic short

## **🎭 ROLES**
1. **LEAD (Male, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film

1. **PARTNER (Any gender, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film

1. **PRESENTER (Female, 20-35)**
* Commercial-style performance
* Confident, warm, slightly “too perfect” tone
* Ability to speak directly to camera

## **📍**LOCATION 
* London, Battersea Power 

## **📅 SHOOT DETAILS** 
* Shoot date: TBC (mid-April)
* Casting deadline: **20th April (URGENT)**

## **💸 COMPENSATION **
* **Unpaid project**
* Travel (London zones) covered
* Food & drinks provided during the shoot
* Film credit + material for showreel

## **📩 TO APPLY **

Self-tape required for all roles.

Please DM or apply via StarNow [https://www.starnow.com/casting/saysorrycom-3141318/](https://www.starnow.com/casting/saysorrycom-3141318/)

sharedPost.text:
🎬 SODIES KASI TV: THE "FOUNDING 40" RECRUITMENT 🎬

Meadowlands, it’s time to tell our own stories. We are building a media empire from the ground up, and we are looking for the hungry, the disciplined, and the visionaries to join us.

THE REALITY CHECK: We are a 100% grassroots startup. We are starting from scratch with:
❌ NO Tools/Equipment (We use our smartphones)
❌ NO Budget/Salary (We work for credits, experience, and growth)
❌ NO Physical Building (The streets of Meadowlands are our studio)

WHO WE NEED:

🎭 ACTORS (Leads & Extras)

Requirements: High discipline, emotional range, and commitment to the "2-on-2-off" schedule. No ego—just talent.

🔊 SOUND & TECHNICAL CREW

Requirements: An ear for detail. Must own a smartphone with storage space to help capture clear audio and shots.

✍️ SCREENWRITERS & CREATIVES

Requirements: Must love Kasi stories and be able to write scripts for local locations.

🏃 PRODUCTION ASSISTANTS (Hustlers)

Requirements: Punctual, organized, and ready to manage the set. If you are 5 minutes early, you are late!

WHY JOIN?
Build a professional portfolio, get listed in our "Green Book" Master Register, and be part of the crew that puts Meadowlands on the global map.

READY TO HUSTLE? APPLY NOW:
👉 https://form.svhrt.com/69b5fc522ac0ef04c5970eab

Student film for SCAD, not paid, nonunion

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Love Thy Neighbor Scott Myers Lead. Mixed, Woman, 28-36. A female attorney (and cannibal) with contempt for those who belittle her finds justice through consummation of her perceived aggressors. On paper, a sociopath, her desires for power and justice, sly nature, and impatience causes friction among strangers. Note: The character does handle firearm that is going to be a practical prop. A certified armorer will be present whenever the prop IS. Will be shown smoking a cigarette and will be done practically using herbal cigarettes.'

May be an image of text that says 'Love Thy Neighbor Lainey Supporting. White, Woman, 20-25 Scott's client's niece, who was responsible for hiring Scott to represent her Uncle Nick. Caught in the middle the misunderstanding Lainey's concerned nature leads her to mix in with Scott's and her uncle's affairs. of Note: Will be in a scene with a firearm which will be a practical prop. A certified armorer will be present whenever the pr is.'

May be an image of text that says 'Love LoveThyNeighbor Thy Neighbor Nicholas Burton Day Player. White, Male, 55-65. Scott's client, presumably a frequent offender. A "particular man" as his niece describes him, includes particularities of brashness, sexism, and intolerance for strangers. A "Don't Tread on Me" mentality. He iS casualty of Scott's murderous cannibalism. His desire is to have the upper hand and sovereignty leads to his downfall. Note: The character does handle a firearm that is going to be practical prop. A certified armorer will be present whenever the prop is.'

items.text:
CASTING CALL - TV SERIES
We’re a passionate team of film makers looking to cast for the next few episodes of our TV series **“UNDONE” **

**There are multiple supporting & Featured roles up for grabs! **

We’re looking for:

**DARNELL: Male Presenting, BIPOC, 27-37, Supporting**

An introverted, devastatingly handsome graphic designer from LA, with a magnetic presence. Darnell is fiery, loyal, and deeply romantic. Looking for emotional depth, ease, warmth, and attunement.

**ALBERT: Male Presenting, 20’s, Supporting**

A streamer/influencer born and bred in LA. Trendy, alert, and always where the party is. Albert is deaf due to tinnitus from years of clubbing starting young, and he reads lips to navigate the world - REQUIRES STRONG COMEDIC TIMING & PHYSICAL PRESENCE

**BILL / HILL: Male & Female Presenting, Caucasian, 50’s - 60’s, Featured**

Jake’s parents, William & Hillary. A warm, tight-knit Southern family with deep roots and strong values. Wealthy farmers who’ve built a life through hard work and family loyalty. They are loving, protective (especially of their sons), and grounded in tradition. Looking for natural chemistry, warmth, and authenticity—actors who can embody both strength and tenderness.

**RON: Male Presenting, Caucasian, 50’s - 60’s, Featured**

A fast-talking venture capitalist with a polished exterior and a slightly slimy edge; think high-powered, always on the move, and used to getting his way. He dates younger and thrives in chaos

**JACKIE: Female Presenting, BIPOC, 45-70’s, Featured**

A grounded, nurturing figure who is a reliable source of support and wisdom. Jackie is a skilled hair braider with a calm presence; the kind of person you can confide inJackie offers both beauty and emotional care with every braid. Looking for warmth, authenticity, and the ability to embody a deep, pure connection with a no nonsense edge. Pam Grier type.

📩** Email your EOI:**

contact@beartigerproductions.com or

elsullivann@outlook.com

🇺🇸 **General American Accent required**

🚫** No DMs — email only**

⏳ **Deadline: July 30**

📍 **Sydney or Los Angeles based only**

items.text:
Christian Weiße in "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze", Spannung, Präsenz und glaubwürdige TV-Momente 

In der Folge "Mein Auto, dein Auto" aus "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze" bin ich in einem der spannendsten Handlungsstränge des Formats zu sehen. Aus einem scheinbar harmlosen Moment beim Magnetangeln wird plötzlich eine hochexplosive Lage, genau diese Verdichtung aus Alltag, Zuspitzung und glaubwürdigem Spiel macht für mich den besonderen Reiz solcher Produktionen aus. 

Mein Dank geht an Joyn, Sat.1 und ganz besonders an filmpool für ein Format, das Tempo, Spannung und Publikumsnähe so wirkungsvoll verbindet. Solche Produktionen zeigen, wie wichtig jedes präzise gesetzte Bild, jede glaubwürdige Reaktion und jede stimmige Figur für die Gesamtwirkung einer Szene ist. 

Ich bringe in solche Einsätze nicht nur natürliche Präsenz vor der Kamera ein, sondern auch ein tiefes Verständnis für Bildwirkung, Timing, Atmosphäre und Produktionsabläufe. Genau diese Verbindung aus Darsteller, Content Creator, Produzent und Kameramensch macht mich für unterschiedlichste Formate interessant, ob TV, Werbung, Doku-Fiction, Social Ads oder fiktionale Stoffe mit realitätsnaher Tonalität. 

Wer für fiktive zukünftige Projekte einen verlässlichen, kameraaffinen und vielseitig einsetzbaren Darsteller sucht, findet in mir eine starke, professionelle und teamorientierte Besetzung mit Gespür für Szenen, Menschen und Wirkung. Köln ist meine Basis, Einsätze gern auch darüber hinaus. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Trauerreden Engelsfeder mit Herz aka Meine FSJ und BFD Erlebnisse und Partner von Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation aka Sanny4me aka Elternnotperfect 

#ChristianWeiße #AufStreife #AufStreifeDieNeuenEinsätze #Joyn #Sat1 #filmpool #Darsteller #Showreel #Schauspiel #Kleindarsteller #Komparse #TVProduktion #ScriptedReality #Storytelling #Kameraaffin

items.text:
🎤 Wir suchen DICH!

Für unseren neuen Videopodcast suchen wir eine kleinwüchsige Persönlichkeit mit Charakter – jemand, der locker, witzig und einfach echt ist.

Geplant sind regelmäßige Außendrehs, bei denen wir Leute auf der Straße ansprechen – dafür brauchen wir jemanden, der keine Scheu hat, auf Menschen zuzugehen und dabei für gute Stimmung sorgt 😄

👉 Wichtig ist uns:

- Du bist offen & spontan
- Du hast Humor und nimmst dich selbst nicht zu ernst
- Erfahrung? Nice to have, aber kein Muss

Ob weiblich, männlich oder divers – völlig egal. Hauptsache, du hast Bock drauf!

💡 Aktuell ist das Ganze unentgeltlich, da wir das Projekt komplett selbst aufbauen und noch nichts daran verdienen.

📍 Gedreht wird hauptsächlich im Raum Reutlingen (City, Straße, spontane Spots).

Wenn du denkst „das passt zu mir“ – schreib mir einfach eine PN!

items.text:
Hi zusammen,
wir suchen aktuell noch 5–6 Darsteller für einen Dreh diesen Mittwoch in Düsseldorf. Deshalb wollte ich einfach mal in die Runde fragen, ob jemand von euch Lust hätte, dabei zu sein.

Zum Dreh: Es handelt sich um ein Musikvideo. In der Szene geht es darum, dass mehrere „Politiker“ vor einem modernen Bürogebäude mit einem Künstler interagieren. Das Ganze ist bewusst überspitzt dargestellt – die Politiker stehen quasi Schlange, um bei ihm etwas zu „kaufen“. Wird aber alles so umgesetzt bzw. zensiert, dass nichts Explizites zu sehen ist.

Der Drehaufwand ist gering, maximal ca. 1 Stunde. Gage liegt bei 50 € pro Person.

Da der Aufwand relativ kurz ist, schauen wir aktuell vor allem nach Leuten, die möglichst aus der Nähe kommen, damit sich die Anreise auch lohnt.

Wichtig wäre nur, dass ihr einen Anzug habt.

Falls jemand Zeit und Lust hat, meldet euch gerne! Und wenn ihr noch jemanden kennt, der gut passen könnte, gerne weiterleiten.

Ansonsten wünsche ich euch einen schönen Tag!

topComments.text: Gerne dabei. Nähe Düsseldorf, Anzüge vorhanden.

Okselever og løg - Det her er en fantastisk opskrift. Hele familien elskede den 
Du skal bruge:
¼ kop mel
450 g okselever
¼-½ kop smør
½ tsk salt
⅛ tsk peber
Jeg skal sige noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter.... Tak.
Link til den fulde opskrift først (c.o.m.m.e.n.t). Se mere

items.text:
[KRAKÓW]
Poszukuję aktorki w wieku 20-25 LAT

Projekt to kampania społeczna na temat zdrowia- scenki aranżowanej sondy ulicznej wśród kobiet. Materiały w formie krótkich reels na social media.

📍 Nagrania: 23.04 (czwartek)
godziny: ok. 11:30-16:00

Stawka: 800 zł netto

Produkcja nie przewiduje zwrotu kosztów logistycznych.

❗️Proszę o zgłaszanie się osób, które na pewno mogą być w tym terminie i tych godzinach w Krakowie i które akceptują wszystkie warunki.

Zgłoszenie zawierające:
- zdjęcie portretowe i zdjęcie sylwetki
- krótkie video z mówieniem do kamery (np. wizytówka)
przesyłać na adres: [casting@krakrafilms.com](mailto:casting@krakrafilms.com)

items.text:
#pilne #płatne DOMÓWKA SENIORÓW  

Cześć! Do sesji promocyjnej w klimacie imprezy na działce szukam energicznych i oryginalnych seniorów.

Zdjęcia 18.04 (jutro), godziny 10-15:30 - Warszawa

Poszukiwane role (60+):
1. Senior statysta - stawka 150 zł
Rola: Członek klubu seniorów. Otwarty i rozrywkowy, bierze aktywny udział w imprezie w ogrodzie.

Opłacamy wyżywienie i ewentualne koszty transportu.

Zainteresowanych proszę o zgłoszenia w wiadomościach prywatnych z:
- aktualnymi zdjęciami twarzy i sylwetki
- wizytówką
- wiekiem
- wzrostem i wymiarami

items.text:
Casting for an incredible cool music video! Male and female roles. Shooting some scenes Monday 27th April in manchester,UK. Cinematic narrative with elements of horror and gothic modernism! Voluntary , with an IMDb credit and images and footage for your portfolio.  Submitting to festivals . Have a listen on Spotify. Email enquiries to irishshowreelscasting@gmail.com 

Characters include bikers and rockers, office workers , burlesque dancers, lady killers and people with interesting faces!  All roles are very juicy. Email or DM images and mark as “music video”

Spotify 

https://open.spotify.com/artist/416Bwr5ukAONtKXYtWNx7j

sharedPost.text:
Always something FRESH going on in my class! Whether it’s street, a musical theatre partner number, something lyrical or a festive Christmas group dance, we like to change it up every few weeks. I do this whilst also keeping things at a steady and manageable pace. (It is a class for beginners after all!) 

#beginnersdance #Liverpool #somethingtodo #tryitchallenge #liverpoolfitness

items.text:
CASTING CALL - “The Sins of Our Father” - NON-UNION

Hi All! We're almost done casting for "The Sins of Our Father", but we're just missing our three main characters younger selves.

Maddie: 14 years, white, women-presenting. **Analytical. Caring. Avoidant.**

Leland: 10-12 years, white, male-presenting. **Free-spirited. Lax. Unbothered.**
Julian: 5-8 years, white, male presenting. **Geeky. Sentimental. Quick-witted.**

Filming will be taking place mid May to mid August, and each character is only needed for 1-3 scenes, in the greater Vancouver area. It is a volunteer project (with IMDb credit, meals provided, copy, and great company).

If your kid is interested in being apart of this amazing project please email their headshot and the name of the character they're auditioning for to thesinsofourfatherfilm@gmail.com by Friday May 1st.

topComments.text: Can I play maddie as a 21 year old white male

items.text:
Just over a week ago, we crowned the Talent Search UK Champion — 14-year-old James Glithero Music from Stockport, Manchester, UK 🇬🇧

Since then, James’ world has truly taken off, stepping into the music industry in such an exciting way — and we couldn’t be prouder.

Keep up the incredible work, James… a star has been born ⭐

📸 Picture taken on the 24th of April 2026 — winner, James Glithero with his Talent Search UK trophy

Could it be you next? 

To be considered for the upcoming series head over to 
www.talentsearchuk.com

items.text:
Casting for an incredible cool music video! Male and female roles. Shooting some scenes Monday 27th April in the Manchester. Cinematic narrative with elements of horror and gothic modernism! Voluntary , with an IMDb credit and images and footage for your portfolio.  Submitting to festivals . Have a listen on Spotify. Email enquiries to irishshowreelscasting@gmail.com 

Characters include bikers and rockers, office workers , burlesque dancers, lady killers and people with interesting faces!  All roles are very juicy. Email or DM images and mark as “music video”

Spotify 

https://open.spotify.com/artist/416Bwr5ukAONtKXYtWNx7j

items.text:
WARSZAWA 30.04.2026r.
REKLAMA SIECI SKLEPÓW SPOŻYWCZYCH

Zgłoszenia przyjmuję do czwartku 23.04 do końca dnia.

SZUKAMY:
- Mężczyzna, aktor - w wieku 28-36 - typ śmiesznego ziomka - rola mówiona.
- Musisz mieć komediowy sznyt. Chętnie coś charakterystycznego w urodzie.

TERMINY:
- 28 lub 29.04.2026 Przymiarki (dokładny dzień zostanie potwierdzony)
- 30.04.2026 ZDJĘCIA W WARSZAWIE

STAWKA:
Stawka: 1500 dzień zdjęciowy + 8000 prawa (12 miesięcy - all media)

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl 
W tytule maila: R30 
Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wizytówkę jako link do YT, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki.

W odpowiedzi na wybrane zgłoszenia prześlę scenkę do nagrania, prawa oraz link do formularza.

Do zobaczenia na planie!

Chętnie coś charakterystycznego w urodzie. TERMINY: 28 lub 29.04.2026 Przymiarki (dokładny dzień zostanie potwierdzony) 30.04.2026 ZDJĘCIA w WARSZAWIE (12 Stawka: 1500 dzień zdjęciowy all media) miesięcy 8000 prawa Zgłoszenia: imię i nazwisko, wizytówka, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. 🎬 CASTING DO SPOTU WIDEO - KRAKÓW 

Hej! Szukamy aktorów do klimatycznego spotu video dla branży edukacyjnej. 

📍 MIEJSCE: Kraków 

⌛️CZAS TRWANIA:  3-5 godzin

📅 DATA: 28.04

KOGO SZUKAMY?

 Chłopak (14-18 lat)

- Swobodna przed kamerą

- Bez kwestii mówionych (gra emocją i mimiką)

🎥 O PROJEKCIE

Krótki, dynamiczny spot pokazujący codzienność nastolatka. 

Proszę o zgłoszenia na adres ➡️ [promocja@pzpo.edu.pl](mailto:promocja@pzpo.edu.pl)

Przykład naszej realizacji: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ihdXqT4WjpM](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ihdXqT4WjpM)

items.text:
Bruce Lee pokazał Sztuki Walki we filmie.

Chuck Norris pokazał, że można zarabiać na Sztukach Walki we filmie.

成龍 Jackie Chan x 李连杰 Jet Li x Donnie Yen 甄子丹 x Jean-Claude Van Damme x Tony Jaa x The Real Michael Jai White i Scott Adkins pokazali, że trzeba być prawdziwym mistrzem Sztuk Walki, aby zrobić karierę we filmie.

काली प्रसाद pokazał, że amator może nauczyć się Sztuk Walki do filmu...

Dzisiaj AI CGI pokazuję, że nie trzeba żadnych mistrzów, kaskaderów ani statystów żeby pokazać współczesne ''filmowe Sztuki Walki''.

Sztuka umiera, gdy ją nauka wypiera.

@obserwujący
@liderzy wśród fanów

items.text:
BOEING BOEING ACTOR CALL OUT!
Rowntree Players are delighted to announce that audition registration for Boeing Boeing is now open✈️

Don’t miss your chance to be part of this fast-paced, hilarious comedy — we’d love to see you there!

Register now and get ready for take-off… 👀✨

Click the link to read our audition pack and register - https://www.rowntreeplayers.co.uk/ 

🎭 Boeing Boeing

📅 23rd - 25th July 2026

📍 The Joseph Rowntree Theatre, York

Cleared for Takeoff: A High-Flying Farce!�This 1960s French farce adapted for the English-speaking stage features self-styled Parisian lothario Bernard, who has Italian, German and American fiancées, each a beautiful airline hostess with frequent “layovers.” He keeps “one up, one down, and one pending” – until unexpected schedule changes bring all three to Paris, and Bernard’s apartment, at the same time.

items.text:
Heya
Just wanted to introduce myself. I’m based between Brighton and London, and have had a strong passion for creation and expression.  I have a strong interest in projects that lean into more depth and emotion. 

I’m always happy and open to collaborate and get involved wherever I can, whether that’s on screen, or supporting the wider creative process. I appreciate being a part of projects that aim to create something a little different.

Looking forward to connecting with you all and seeing what’s we could work on!

items.text:
Hello! I’m a professional hairstylist based in London with over 7 years of experience.

I’m currently looking for a model for a free creative haircut to build my portfolio. This is a great opportunity if you’re open to a fresh, stylish look and would like a high-quality cut at no cost.

If you’re interested, please send me a message with a recent photo of your hair. I’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

Thank you!

items.text:
**KOLLECTIVE KANDOR (LA BASED)**
 **CASTING CALL "FIND YOUR KIN"**

*Cinematic Social Ad a Kollective Kandor Production*
**PRODUCTION DETAILS**

** SHOOT DATE:** April 28th, 2025

** TIME:** 12:00 PM – 4:00 PM

** LOCATION:** Elysian Park, Los Angeles

** RATE:** Unpaid / Copy & Credit
**THE ROLE: CAELUM (LEAD CHARACTER)**

** CHARACTER TYPE:** Male or Masculine-Presenting/Passing

** AGE RANGE:** 21–35 years old (Open Ethnicity)

** REQUIREMENTS:** Looking for an actor with **significant emotional range**. Caelum carries a heavy burden of grief and isolation.

**Candidates who are emotionally capable of ON-CAMERA CRYING are a massive plus.** We need someone who can convey the raw vulnerability of a one-sided voicemail in a public space.

** CHARACTER ENERGY:** Quiet storm. Creatively talented but emotionally drained. Recently quit corporate job. Grieving in silence. Yearning for authentic connection.
**WARDROBE REQUIREMENTS**

**Please come prepared with:**
*  Dress Shirt (Black or Blue)
*  Tie (Black or Blue)
*  Pants (Match the shirt/tie)
*  Denim Jacket (If you have one - MAJOR PLUS!)
**ABOUT THE PROJECT**

This is a cinematic social campaign for **Kollective Kandor**, telling the story of a young creative grieving his sibling while finding community again.

The piece explores **mental health**, **isolation**, and the power of **chosen family** in the creative community.

**Tagline:** *"When You're Alone, You're Not Alone. Find Your Kin."*
**HOW TO APPLY**

**Comment "AVAILABLE" below and we'll DM you our application!**

 **First Come, First Serve – Submit ASAP!**

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL for a SHORT fantasy film - PAID roles- CHICAGO **

**PROJECT TITLE: Shed**

**PROJECT TYPE:** Short film Drama/Fantasy

**PRODUCTION COMPANY:** Searching Productions

**PRODUCTION TEAM: Writer/Director - Stephanie Jeter; EP - Lilly Wachowski**

**UNION STATUS: **Open to union and non-union actors -**PAID**

**PROJECT SYNOPSIS:** A couple’s harmonious relationship begins to unravel when the woman comes home to unexpectedly find a locked shed in her back yard and a husband who won’t tell her what’s inside.

**LOCATION**: Chicago, IL or surrounding area (exact location TBD)

**SHOOT DATES: June 1-June 7**

**ROLES:**

**These roles are for actors local to Chicagoland only**

**LAYLA** - woman, 30-39, Black: A high-achieving soror type whose curiosity might be getting the best of her. 

**RANDALL** - man, 30-39, Black, Asian, or Indigenous: An easygoing and sensitive man in the midst of an identity crisis. 

**LITTLE BOY** - boy, 8-11, Black, Asian, or Indigenous: Newly recovered from a battle with a life-threatening illness he tries his best to present a brave face for his family. (This is a non-speaking role.)

EXPECTED HOURS: TBD

ADDITIONAL COMPENSATION: Transportation reimbursement (capped)

**SUBMISSION DETAILS: Please send a head shot, resume, and reel (if available) to** **ShedFilmChi@gmail.com**, 

**SUBJECT:  ‘Cast submission -***** Role*****’.** 

**Please submit no later than April 29, 2026.**

**If you are invited to audition, we will provide sides and ask that you submit a self-taped audition.*

**CALL BACKS:** Callbacks and chemistry reads will be held between May 4th and May 7th in Chicago.

Follow us on: Instagram **shed.movie**

items.text:
***[Casting Call - Malay Kids Cooking Show]***

The Moving Visuals Co. is currently looking for kids to feature in an upcoming Malay Kids Cooking Show, "Ai Ai Cef 2"

**Details:**

**Film Period: **30th May 2026 - 11th June 2026. Kids are only needed for one day from period mentioned.

**Deadline**

Submit ASAP **(Best By end of April). **Contact the number below if more time is needed.

**Requirements**

1. Aged 7-12

2. Can converse in Malay

3. Fun & Out-Going

4. Have basic cooking skills. (Able to follow a recipe)

If interested do send in a recent photo and one minute video of introducing yourself with answers to the following questions. Video is to be done in Malay.

* What is your favourite food?

* What are the food(s) that you like to cook and why?

For more questions & submission of deliverables, do send in an email to production3@tmvc.sg & CC naqeaosman@tmvc.sg & casting@tmvc.sg

Feel free to contact me ( Iman ) at 9326 3626

items.text: SWR und Montavia suchen gemeinsam nach Komparsen und Kleindarsteller*innen für eine Fußballserie in Ludwigsburg. Gedreht wird ab Anfang Juni. Alle Bewerbungsinformationen findet Ihr hier:

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Komparsen und Kleindarsteller für SWR Montavia Fußballserie in Ludwigsburg gesucht Du bist über 18 Jahre, kommst aus Baden-Württemberg willst vor die Kamera und Fußball st für dich das Größte? Wir suchen Mitspieler und Gegner, Fans, Meckerrentner*innen Waffel Omas und Opas, und Alles was Ihr mit Amateurfußball und Kreisliga verbindet. Meldet Euch mit einem Foto oder einem kurzen Vorstellungsvideo unter: Drehbeginn: Juni 2026 Falls Ihr was am Ball könnt, lasst uns das uuuunbedingt sehen. Erzählt uns Eure schöste teFußballgeschichte. Außerdem bitte Telefonnummer, die Anschrift und das Geburtsdatum angeben. Wir freuen uns auf Eure Nachrichten! Mortania SWR>'

topComments.text: Möchte mich gerne bewerben bitte um mitteilung was sie von mir brauchen.danke.herr wagner.

**Komparsen / Kleindarsteller gesucht in Dortmund**
Für einen **vergüteten Verkehrssicherheitsclip** suchen wir für **einen Drehtag Ende Mai** junge Leute im **Spielalter 18–25**.
Gesucht werden natürliche, zuverlässige, **kameraaffine** Menschen. Schauspielerfahrung ist nicht erforderlich.

Bei Interesse bitte schicken:
2 Fotos, Alter, Wohnort, Handynummer, gern kurzes Selfie-Video an: adrian@proimago.de

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget Fantasy Horror Spielfilm Projekt, suchen wir noch Darsteller für die Endschlacht, Rollen: Ritter und Räuber. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald, Zeitraum ab April 2026
Bewerbungen mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, (gerne könnt ihr und auch ein kleines Vorstellungsvideo senden) an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
Casting:
1. JEWISH RABBI TYPE. Beard preferred. This film is a cop drama, nothing weird or anti-religious. Nothing like that. Script/plot just calls tor a Rabbl.
2. ASIAN WOMAN 19-30. Rear nudity (quick shot of your backside. Thong ok).
There is pay. Shooting in mid May. Los Angeles is the shooting location.
Send a photo please. Keep the resumes. You're in the face business, my friends!

items.text:
Talent agent looking for babies 3 months to 24 months old

 (DO NOT DM ) 

Project Synopsis

NON UNION PRINT & VIDEO

SHOOT DATE: MAY 11 - MAY 15

*Multiple shoot days not guaranteed*

Shoot Location: Miami, FL

Talent must work as locals.

RATES: *+20% Agency Fee if applicable

ADULT SESSION RATE: $750+20% per 10 hour session, to include any and all potential fittings.

ADULT USAGE RATE IF RECOGNIZABLE:: $1,750+20% to include the below term, territory, and media.

Guaranteed at time of booking.

ADULT USAGE RATE IF UNRECOGNIZABLE:: $1,000+20% to include the below term, territory, and media.

Guaranteed at time of booking.

MINORS SESSION RATE: $350+20% per max time allowed on set, to include any and all potential fittings.

MINORS USAGE RATE: $750+20% to include the below term, territory, and media. Guaranteed at time of

booking.

USAGE

TERM: 3 years

TERRITORY: Worldwide

MEDIA: Digital, Paid social, Organic Social, Web, Email, OOH, Industrial and In-Store Signage (ie. for Walmart

displays, etc.)

You must be represented by Go Talent for this specific casting.

Kids Casting and Project Casting you do not have my permission to share this casting.

email agent@gotalentagency.com 

subject "Miami baby" 

send recent cell phone photo shoulders up and smiling.

items.text:
****CASTING CALL FOR INDEPENDENT SHORT FILM*****

**TITLE: **Vinyl Nights

**DIRECTOR: **Brandon Maxwell

**CONTACT: **gyrescapefilm@gmail.com

**SHOOT DATE: **June 2026 (date dependent on availability) in Los Angeles

**GENRE: **LGBTQ+ period rom-com

**LOGLINE: **Billy and Tommy, two seemingly polar-opposite waiters at a small-town diner, form an unexpected connection in their late-night shifts. As their relationship deepens, they’re forced to confront the limitations of their small town and decide whether love is something they can afford to risk in pursuit of their big dreams.

-------- 

**ROLES:**

**All roles are paid and must be comfortable with same-sex kissing. Dance experience preferred as well.**

**Billy **(Lead, male-presenting, 18-27)
* Artsy, expressive, and a little guarded
* Dreams of leaving town to pursue Broadway
* Uses humor and attitude to mask his true emotions

**Tommy **(Lead, male-presenting, 18-27)
* High school jock type
* Confident, grounded, sincere
* Dreams of being a writer but grapples with his family values

If interested, please comment your email and role(s) of interest below and I’ll reach out with more info! Please do not DM as those will not be read. Self tapes and headshots will be requested for each part. :)

topComments.text: Hello! My email is lamont.pennie20@gmail.com. I’m interested in the role of Billy but would be open o reading for Tommy as well!

items.text:
CASTING CALL - EDGAR ALLAN POE SPEAKEASY EVENT (PAID)
Seeking talented, local actors in Pittsburgh, PA ages 21-45 for a pop-up cocktail event.

Our performances feature actors delivering compelling dramatic monologues based off of Edgar Allan Poe's works. Must be available to work Thursday April 30th - Sunday May 5th. 

Role Requirements: 
* Memorize and perform a dramatic 8-10 minute monologue for an intimate theater audience in a small venue setting that prioritizes mood, atmosphere, and connection with the audience. 
* Must be reliable, professional, punctual and able to work with a team
* Ability to deliver intense, emotionally rich monologues
* Experience with solo or immersive performance a plus
* Comfortable performing multiple times in one night
* Experience with serving (optional, for additional pay) and/or customer service a plus, but not required

This is a unique role combining acting, improv and bartending/serving skills (optional, for additional pay) in a fast-paced, guest facing environment.

If interested please email sierra@rockstarbeer.com with headshot, resume & contact info. Audition materials will be sent to inquiring email. Inquire about serving as well for additional pay!

items.text:
I’m casting people in Georgia for a short cinematic YouTube project.

I’m looking for someone who is currently experiencing or reflecting on one of the following:

a dream or idea they haven’t started
a life transition or change
a creative block or reset
something personal they’ve been sitting with

Filming will take place within the next 1–2 weeks and will take about 1–2 hours total. Location will be local in Georgia and kept simple/comfortable.

This is an unpaid, passion-based creative project. Selected participants will receive a cinematic video feature, a copy of their final edited segment, and will be part of a storytelling series they can share once released (with permission).

No acting experience needed — just openness and comfort being on camera.
If you’re interested, please DM or email jcut22media@gmail.com 

You can also submit a short form here:

https://forms.gle/7W27ByJRQMp6iT3j9

items.text:
CASTING CALL – Energy Drink Spec! (OC/LA, Paid) 

Currently casting for (3) youthful, female leads for an energy drink spec for a growing production company. 

The shoot (non-union) will be in Los Angeles/Orange County, sometime in May, with a day rate of $50. Along with compensation, the actors will get some BTS & additional photos + videos for  their social media/reel/portfolio.  

ISO: 

(1) – Beach Runner: clean, natural, everyday, fit/athletic girl-next-door type of character, this position will require some light jogging/running 
(1) – Pilates/Yoga Practitioner: quiet confidence, natural vibe, fit/athletic, disciplined
(1) – Party Attendee: Free Spirited, extroverted, high energy, bright smile,bold-ish vibe, but still maintaining the clean, athletic/fit look, etc. 

* Each role will have different skills/requirements

If interested, please submit your: 
- Contact information
- Dates you’re available in May
- Headshot, full body shot, reel
- Resume
to riannamamitag.prod@gmail.com ! 

Please follow the subject line format of: First Last Name - Role(s) - Spec 

Looking forward to your submissions & connecting with you! Please submit your profile & related materials by 5/1 .

items.text:
CGTV question 
Did anyone take their kid to a CGTV audition and not get a callback saying they were picked as one of the 50?

My daughter got called back and told she was one of the few but I was just wondering if they say that to everyone.

topComments.text: Scam. Everyone gets invited back your a paying customer. You can self submit to agencies for free. It should never cost you anything to get in front of an agent. Go on the sag list and self submit for free! CGTV, Barbizon, ipop, etc are all unnecessary cash grabs that target unsuspecting parents.
It’s a scam, everyone gets invited, and they charge huge fees for kids’ representation.

items.text: FIRST CLASS FREE!!! (Check out videos on our page.) 🙌😊

sharedPost.text:
Looking for something new and fun to do? That won’t cost the earth but leave you feeling amazing? 🤔

Come and move, laugh and stress bust with us! My BEGINNERS dance classes are for EVERYBODY. (I can’t stress this enough. Even if you think you can’t dance, in my sessions, we don’t care!) 

Just come have a go. We move for the joy of movement and all the benefits it can bring, not for perfection or to look good. (That happens all on its own, over time. 🙌 And if that’s something you’re striving for, then I’ll help you get there. 👌)

Thursday classes begin again on May 14th. Brand new routine, great time to grab a friend and try your first class for FREE!!!! 

Can’t make Thursdays? That’s ok, drop me a message about Monday classes! 🙌

#danceclasses #liverpoolfitness #beginnersdance #tryitchallenge #FreeClass #trybeforeyoubuy #newhobby #liverpooluk

Huge opportunities just landed on our desks, major TV & film projects 🎬
We are currently looking for:
🌟 Blonde girls 3 - 9 years
🌟 Girls 5 - 14 years
🌟 Boys 3 - 18 years

 The ‘APPLY section’ on website is currently down - APPLY VIA EMAIL

No experience needed - training available through our academy

items.text:
Just over a week ago, we crowned the Talent Search UK Champion — 14-year-old James Glithero Music from Stockport, Manchester, UK 🇬🇧

Since then, James’ world has truly taken off, stepping into the music industry in such an exciting way — and we couldn’t be prouder.

Keep up the incredible work, James… a star has been born ⭐

📸 Picture taken on the 24th of April 2026 — winner, James Glithero with his Talent Search UK trophy

Could it be you next? 

To be considered for the upcoming series head over to 
www.talentsearchuk.com

🎬 NOWA PRODUKCJA - SERIAL - PRZEŻYJ PRZYGODĘ NA PLANIE ZDJĘCIOWYM ! 🎬

Kolejny ciekawy projekt współczesny - SZUKAMY STATYSTÓW I EPIZODYSTÓW W BIELSKO- BIAŁEJ I OKOLICACH!

📅 Zdjęcia: 26, 27 oraz 28 MAJA 2026!

🎥 Gatunek: serial współczesny

Szukamy osób o różnym wyglądzie i pochodzeniu – zarówno europejskim, jak i etnicznym.

💰 Stawka dla statystów: 120-140 zł (gotówka wypłacana po dniu zdjęciowym)

Stawka za epizody od 180 zł

📩 Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy wyłącznie przez formularz poniżej:

https://forms.gle/eF4SvrHVvq8aLto97

Zgłoś się i przeżyj niesamowitą przygodę na planie filmowym!

items.text:
Mutige Darsteller/in in Düsseldorf und Umgebung gesucht 🎞🎥

Das wohl mutigste Kurzfilm Projekt steht uns bevor! 

Dazu werden noch Schauspieler und Komparsen gesucht! 🫵 (m/w/d)
Hast du Lust vor der Kamera zu stehen und kein Problem "Preußen" in die Welt zu rufen, dann bist du hier genau richtig!

🔲 Wann? Mai/Juni 2026
🔲 Wo? Raum Düsseldorf 
🔲 Gage? No Budget 

Die gemachten Aufnahmen dürfen für's persönliche Showreel frei genutzt werden. Für Verpflegung 🥘 ist gesorgt. Gage kann leider nicht gezahlt werden.

Ziel ist es einen modernen Kurzfilm in höchster Kinoqualität zu produzieren 💪

Bewerbung, bitte mit Infos (Alter, Schauspielerfahrung,...) und zwei Fotos als PN an mich!

Danke und viel Erfolg!
Aus Rheinprovinz

items.text:
# **Jeg søger to kvinder i alderen 18-25 år til en skitse.**

Skitsen er mit afgangsprojekt fra Københavns Kunstskole.

 

Erfaring er ikke et must, men du skal have det naturligt og afslappet foran et kamera.

 

Optagelser vil ligge i næste weekend d. 1.-3. maj. (Hvis en aften i den kommende uge passer bedre er jeg også flexibel)

 

Location ligger endnu ikke helt fast, men det bliver på Sjælland. Jeg skal nok stå for transport frem og tilbage.

 

Se mere om projektet på billedet og send hjertens gerne Pb for mere info.

 

Dbh,

Thomas Hagbard

items.text:
Actors needed for Steam Punk Proof-of-Concept film. Full Green Screen studio based just outside of east London. This is a fully professional crew and we are looking for actors with showreels and experience. It is deferred payment, IMDB credits and of course you'll be well looked after on set - and promised awesome showreel material. This is non-commercial and a lot of it is experimentational with after effects and AI (but not changing your face! So, if AI / CGI and Green Screen not your bag, no need to apply). Filming dates are the last week of May, 25th - 31st approx - time on set depends on the character. 

The picture references are just a guide and all ethnicities VERY WELCOME

Send your Headshots and any relevant reel links to the director (me) at dawnfwall@gmail.com by APRIL 30th to be considered. Please don't send me material to download. Upload videos to youtube as an unlisted link if you need to, and send the link. Many Thanks ❤️🙏🎬

items.text:
Hello everyone 🙂

CASTING CALL BLACK, ASIAN OR MIXED ACTRESS (VOICE OVER ROLE FOR VIDEO GAME)

I am currently casting for a narrative-driven VR project at Escape Studios titled Heavy is the Crown, and I am looking for a voice actress to portray the lead role of Lenore Vespen.

Lenore is a complex, emotionally layered character, and the performance is voice-over led, with a strong focus on internal monologue, subtlety, and psychological depth.

For this role, we are specifically seeking a Black, Asian or mixed-race actress, as the character is of African and Asian heritage.

I would love to invite any actress interested to submit a self-tape for the role. Please find attached the casting brief, which includes full details of the project and a monologue for audition.

This is a student industry project with a £100 honorarium, offering a strong, narrative-focused piece for showreel, as well as collaboration within a semi-professional production environment.

Self-tape deadline is set on April 30th and the recording session will take place on the week starting May 4th, the day will be set at the actress's convenience.

Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions—I’d be very happy to provide further information.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration.

Don’t hesitate to share to any actress you think might fit the role I would really appreciate it,

Thanks,

Mary-Jane
Director

items.text:
Casting Call for a student short film that I am filming next week. Relevant information is included as attached. 

If you have any questions, or if you are interested, please email me at Osworld.media@gmail.com and provide a headshot and/or small showreel, and I shall provide a copy of the script and discuss futher with you.

I am looking for a male and female aged 30+ to play the roles of the mother and father of my protagonist. The parents are featured in two scenes in the film, totalling to approximately 3-4 minutes of sceen time.

Please respond as soon as you can if you are interested, as filming will take place on either Sunday 12th April or Monday 13th April, depending on what is most convenient

Many thanks

items.text:
**Actors with or without prior experience are welcome.**

You may apply even without a CV or filmography. Just send your recent photos (headshot, side profile, full body) and basic information (age, height, contact details).

‼️ **CASTING CALL FOR A SHORT FILM** ‼️

📍 Shoot: June 2026 | Cavite

⸻

📌 **ROLES:**

**MATT / THEO**

Male, 16–17 years old (screen age)

⸻

📌 **SUBMISSION DETAILS:**

Send your:

* Recent photos (headshot, side profile, full body)
* Basic information (name, age, height, contact details)
* Sample works / CV / reel (**only** if available)

📧 **projectpagkislap@gmail.com**

🗓 Deadline: April 24, 11:59 PM

**Shortlisted applicants will be contacted for audition materials and further instructions.**

Talent fee, food, and transportation will be provided.

⸻

For inquiries, please contact via email only.

items.summary:
**Actors with or without prior experience are welcome.**

You may apply even without a CV or filmography. Just send your recent photos (headshot, side profile, full body) and basic information (age, height, contact details).

‼️ **CASTING CALL FOR A SHORT FILM** ‼️

📍 Shoot: June 2026 | Cavite

⸻

📌 **ROLES:**

**MATT / THEO**

Male, 16–17 years old (screen age)

⸻

📌 **SUBMISSION DETAILS:**

Send your:

* Recent photos (headshot, side profile, full body)
* Basic information (name, age, height, contact details)
* Sample works / CV / reel (**only** if available)

📧 **projectpagkislap@gmail.com**

🗓 Deadline: April 24, 11:59 PM

**Shortlisted applicants will be contacted for audition materials and further instructions.**

Talent fee, food, and transportation will be provided.

⸻

For inquiries, please contact via email only.

CASTING CALL
Looking for a male narrator for a 5-act poetic short. The tone shifts from heavy/troubled to hopeful. Unpaid, but providing IMDb/TMDB credit. DM me and I'll send the first part of the script for a trial read. 😁

items.text:
🎭 ONLINE 1:1 ACTING COACH 🎬

Led by experienced tutors, these 30 or 60 minute sessions are fun, flexible and fully tailored to each child—building confidence, creativity, screen technique and more in a safe, supportive environment. Whether they’re just starting out, growing their talent or needing some help with a last minute self-tape, we offer support and guidance each step of the way in this ever-evolving industry!

Contact us today for more information - classes@mcaa.co.uk

www.cherrypipsacting.co.uk
